header.description: Static header information (Invoice No, Date, Bill To, Ship To) is handled by the template structure; no dynamic scalar tokens are mapped in this schema.

rows.description: List of invoice line items or invoice summaries containing description and total amount.

totals.description: No aggregate totals are defined in the schema for this report view.

semantics: The report maps invoice-level data directly to row tokens. `row_description` pulls the vendor name (override), and `row_total` pulls the final invoice total. Filtering is supported by invoice date.
